name: Dashboard (Halaman Utama)
tagline: Beranda per-persona: konteks, KPI, mini-map, aktivitas, quick actions, module grid

children.name: Konteks Bar
children.desc: Selektor provinsi, periode, dan skenario aktif sebagai konteks global seluruh platform

children.name: KPI Cards
children.desc: 4 angka utama yang berubah per persona (Risk Index, Risk Alerts, Model Running, dll.)

children.name: Mini Risk Map
children.desc: Peta risiko ringkas tertanam (embed FITUR 8.1) dengan drill-down per wilayah

children.name: Activity Feed
children.desc: Linimasa aktivitas terbaru: alert, komentar, laporan, skenario (FITUR 7.2 + histori)

children.name: Quick Actions
children.desc: 3–4 aksi cepat prioritas yang menyesuaikan persona pengguna

children.name: Module Grid
children.desc: Pintu masuk visual ke 10 modul utama platform

children.name: Footer Status
children.desc: Status kesehatan sistem & uptime layanan GeoVertix

name: Map Explorer
tagline: Peta risiko full-screen: layer toggle, time slider, scenario picker, drawing & measurement

children.name: Layer Switcher
children.desc: Aktif/nonaktif layer peta (hazard, batas administrasi, infrastruktur)

children.name: Time Slider
children.desc: Penggeser waktu multi-temporal untuk animasi perubahan kondisi

children.name: Scenario Picker
children.desc: Pemilih skenario untuk overlay proyeksi di peta

children.name: Drawing Tools
children.desc: Alat gambar anotasi area di atas peta

children.name: Measurement Tools
children.desc: Alat ukur jarak dan luas

children.name: Print / Export to Map
children.desc: Cetak atau ekspor tampilan peta (mini FITUR 8.4)

children.name: Saved Locations
children.desc: Lokasi tersimpan (pin) per pengguna

name: Climate Modeling
tagline: Pemodelan iklim: hindcast, LULC, SLR, banjir/kekeringan, biodiversity, carbon

children.name: Advanced Climate Modeling
children.desc: Ensemble CMIP6 downscaling untuk skala kab/kota, multi-scenario

children.name: LULC Change Detection
children.desc: Multi-temporal Sentinel-2 + ML classification — perubahan tutupan lahan

children.name: Net Carbon Footprint
children.desc: Akunting karbon spasial: sumber, sink, neraca neto

children.name: Biodiversity Mapping
children.desc: Species richness, habitat connectivity, area kunci

children.name: Sea Level Rise & Subsidence
children.desc: Proyeksi SLR + subsidence pesisir terintegrasi

children.name: Flood & Drought Modeling
children.desc: Hydrological modeling: banjir dan kekeringan

children.name: Hindcasting Tool
children.desc: Validasi model vs. data observasi (fokus peneliti)

children.name: Continuous Model Monitor
children.desc: Monitoring real-time akurasi model in-production

children.name: Model Compression
children.desc: Kompresi & optimasi model untuk deployment edge/mobile

children.name: Multi-Criteria Vulnerability Assessment
children.desc: Weighted overlay 12+ indikator (hazard, exposure, sensitivity, adaptive capacity)

children.name: Dynamic Vulnerability System Modeling
children.desc: Simulasi feedback loop antar-indikator dengan system dynamics

name: Sectoral Analysis
tagline: Analisis sektoral: RDTR, pangan, pesisir, karhutla, wisata, energi, daya dukung

children.name: Spatial Planning Support Toolbox (RDTR)
children.desc: Modul utama dukung RDTR/RTRW: zonasi, peruntukan, konflik kepentingan

children.name: Food Security (Rice Field)
children.desc: Vulnerability sawah terhadap iklim · prediksi produksi padi

children.name: Coastal Vulnerability
children.desc: Indeks kerentanan pesisir (CVI) terhadap SLR + abrasi

children.name: Forest Fire Risk (ENSO-aware)
children.desc: Risiko karhutla dengan ML + sinyal ENSO/IOD

children.name: Tourism Sector Vulnerability
children.desc: Kerentanan obyek wisata terhadap perubahan iklim

children.name: Renewable Energy Deployment Optimization
children.desc: Pemilihan lokasi optimal PLTS/PLTB/PLTM dengan constraint sosial-ekologis

children.name: Land Carrying Capacity
children.desc: Daya dukung dan daya tampung lingkungan

name: Decision Support (SDSS Core)
tagline: Inti pendukung keputusan: scenario builder, MCDA, impact, what-if, optimization

children.name: Multi-Level Decision Support
children.desc: Entry-point per persona ke fitur SDSS lainnya

children.name: Scenario Manager & Planning Builder
children.desc: CRUD skenario + planning wizard 5 langkah

children.name: Impact Analysis Engine
children.desc: Hitung dampak skenario ke sektor terkait

children.name: Customizable Adaptation Recommendation
children.desc: Rekomendasi aksi adaptasi + ranking

children.name: MCDA Engine
children.desc: Multi-criteria decision analysis · weighted overlay

children.name: Context-Aware Recommendation Engine
children.desc: Rekomendasi yang mengikuti konteks aktif

children.name: Group Decision-Making
children.desc: Sesi kolaborasi real-time untuk sign-off multi-stakeholder

children.name: Simulation & What-If Tool
children.desc: Quick-sim interaktif: slider parameter → outcome real-time

children.name: Sensitivity & Uncertainty Analyzer
children.desc: Analisis sensitivitas Monte Carlo · uncertainty band

children.name: Optimization Solver
children.desc: Multi-objective optimization · NSGA-II

name: AI Assistant
tagline: Asisten AI: NLP query, RAG, anomaly EWS, image recognition, XAI

children.name: Natural Language Query
children.desc: Tanya platform dengan bahasa Indonesia natural · always-on AI

children.name: RAG Pipeline & Knowledge Base
children.desc: Retrieval-augmented generation dari dokumen K/L (background)

children.name: MCP Server
children.desc: Model Context Protocol server untuk integrasi tools (dev-only)

children.name: Image & Pattern Recognition
children.desc: Deteksi objek dari citra satelit: deforestasi, urban sprawl, kebakaran

children.name: Anomaly Detection & EWS
children.desc: Deteksi anomali real-time dari stream data · trigger crisis mode

children.name: Predictive Modeling Framework
children.desc: Framework ML untuk prediksi + ops (MLOps)

children.name: Scenario-Based Analysis Engine
children.desc: Backend untuk Scenario Builder (terhubung ke FITUR 5.2)

children.name: Federated Learning
children.desc: Train model lintas-organisasi tanpa berbagi data mentah

children.name: Explainable AI (XAI)
children.desc: Penjelasan feature importance + counterfactual untuk setiap output AI

name: Collaboration
tagline: Konsultasi multi-stakeholder, anotasi & komentar, perbandingan skenario

children.name: Multi-Stakeholder Consultation Workflow
children.desc: Workflow konsultasi multi-pihak dengan sign-off, voting, rekap

children.name: Annotation & Comment System
children.desc: Komentar inline di peta, skenario, dan laporan — lintas-fitur

children.name: Scenario Comparison Tool
children.desc: Side-by-side diff 2–4 skenario · highlight perbedaan

name: Reports & Outputs
tagline: Dashboard dinamis, ringkasan eksekutif otomatis, custom report builder

children.name: Interactive Map (Advanced)
children.desc: Tautan ke Map Explorer untuk eksplorasi peta lanjutan

children.name: Dynamic Dashboards
children.desc: Dashboard kustom: drag-drop widget, embed map/chart/text

children.name: Executive Summary Auto-Generation
children.desc: Ringkasan eksekutif otomatis dari konteks aktif (1–4 halaman)

children.name: Custom Report Builder
children.desc: Builder drag-drop untuk laporan multi-section

name: Data Catalog
tagline: Katalog ISO 19115, lineage, quality, stream, versioning + integrasi K/L

children.name: Data Catalog ISO 19115
children.desc: Katalog metadata standar ISO 19115 — browse & cari dataset geospasial

children.name: Data Lineage
children.desc: Pelacakan asal & transformasi data (provenance)

children.name: Data Quality Dashboard
children.desc: Metrik kualitas data ISO 19157 (kelengkapan, akurasi, konsistensi)

children.name: Stream Processor
children.desc: Pemrosesan stream real-time IoT & citra satelit (Kafka) — admin

children.name: Data Versioning
children.desc: Manajemen versi & snapshot dataset

children.name: One Map Policy (BIG)
children.desc: Base mapping kebijakan Satu Peta (RBI resmi) · WMS/WMTS

children.name: BNPB InaRISK / InaSAFE
children.desc: Indeks risiko bencana nasional untuk cross-validation hazard

children.name: BMKG Climate Service
children.desc: Curah hujan, temperatur, peringatan dini — feed real-time

children.name: KLHK SIGN-SMART
children.desc: Data kehutanan & inventarisasi emisi GRK nasional

children.name: BPS Socio-Economic
children.desc: Sensus, Susenas, Sakernas, PDB regional

children.name: Upload Data
children.desc: Form unggah dataset pengguna (tautan ke FITUR 10.1)

name: Settings & Admin
tagline: Profil, autentikasi, audit, bahasa, onboarding, API/developer, integrasi

children.name: Profile
children.desc: Pengaturan profil pengguna (avatar, nama, organisasi)

children.name: Authentication & Authorization
children.desc: Manajemen autentikasi & hak akses (tier admin)

children.name: Notification Settings
children.desc: Preferensi notifikasi per-pengguna (in-app/email/SMS/push)

children.name: Audit Logger
children.desc: Log audit aktivitas sistem (admin only)

children.name: i18n / Language
children.desc: Preferensi bahasa antarmuka ID/EN

children.name: Onboarding / Tutorial
children.desc: Pemicu ulang panduan & tutorial halaman utama

children.name: API & Developer
children.desc: Dokumentasi API & OGC services + token (researcher/dev)

children.name: Integrations Status
children.desc: Status integrasi K/L (referensi 13.x tampilan admin)

children.name: About / Help
children.desc: Versi, lisensi, kredit & pusat bantuan
